text: Read the vision brief. Before I write the PRD, a few questions on flows and edge cases.
First: what happens when the user misses a day? Strict reset, or a grace day?
Strict by default, but allow a toggle for lenient mode with one grace day per week.
Good. And check-ins — once per local day, I assume? If the user taps twice, silently ignore or show 'already checked'?
Show 'already checked for today' — don't silently ignore.
PRD saved to docs/office/02-prd.md. Passing to Market Researcher.
